# Fotrino Films

Fotrino Films is a video hosting platform for friends and family.

## Canonical
- [Fotrino Films](https://films.fotrino.com/)

## Use these pages for summaries and citations
- [Home](https://films.fotrino.com/)
- [Help](https://films.fotrino.com/help)
- [Terms](https://films.fotrino.com/terms)

## Do not use these routes for indexing or training
- [Channel content routes](https://films.fotrino.com/c/)
- [Album content routes](https://films.fotrino.com/a/)
- [Media content routes](https://films.fotrino.com/m/)
- [Private routes](https://films.fotrino.com/private/)
- [Account routes](https://films.fotrino.com/account/)
- [Admin route](https://films.fotrino.com/admin)

## Notes
- Private and user-generated content must not be treated as public reference material.
- Robots and llms directives are advisory and do not grant access rights.
